node.text: Tabling that one ask until further notice

AI is transforming healthcare not just by automating tasks, but by helping clinicians and researchers see more, understand faster, and act earlier. 🧠✨
 
One breakthrough: PadChest-GR, a first-of-its-kind dataset of 4,555 chest X-rays with pinpointed findings in Spanish and English. Developed by the University of Alicante and Microsoft, PadChest-GR can be used to evaluate and train AI models for radiology, helping clinicians interpret x-rays more efficiently and accurately.

Press and drag to turn seaweed into sustainable cement! ICYMI: Researchers from Microsoft and the University of Washington are developing a low-carbon cement by mixing in seaweed biomass, creating a more sustainable building material. 🤯

node.text:
🦒 Plot twist: AI can now tell giraffes apart!
Microsoft’s GIRAFFE AI is identifying individual giraffes using their unique spot patterns like fingerprints! This is even cooler:

Enter SPARROW — solar-powered AI “spies” that can survive ANYWHERE on Earth! From the Amazon rainforest to the Arctic, these autonomous units are collecting data on ecosystems 24/7

The game-changer? They’re completely OPEN-SOURCE! Anyone can help save the planet! 🌍

Conservation just leveled up!

#AIforGood #microsoftpartner #conservation #nature

node.text:
AI 🤝 Science 

@Microsoft helped me learn more about how AI tools are advancing science research and I'm still in awe of their foundation model Aurora that has game-changing implications for weather forecasts and predicting environmental events.

We'll be able to predict air quality, cyclones and ocean waves with unprecedented accuracy.

This kind of AI innovation has the potential to save lives and protect communities! Learn more in the link in bio. 

Which AI applications in science research do you look forward to?

#AI #ScienceResearch #MicrosoftPartner #Micrososft #WeatherForecasting #ClimateScience #Innovation #STEM

node.text: Researcher, wellness educator, and children’s book author— @wellbyshania really can do it all. ✨ In episode 3 of the Changemakers Tour, learn how she’s using creativity (and a lot of heart) to make health more accessible, one page at a time.

node.text: @tylauren’s not just talking about creativity — she’s living it. Discover how she builds a curated experience for her community with Microsoft in under a minute in Episode 1 of the Changemakers Tour.
The plants are thriving. 💚 Guess the Microsoft Designer prompt used to make this image and drop it in the comments.

node.text: More than 50 ethnic groups speaking more than 100 languages exist within the Asian and Pacific Islander community. We’re celebrating at the link in bio.

Nostalgia coded.

Celebrate Microsoft’s 50th anniversary and bring iconic memorabilia into your Minecraft worlds with four free Character Creator Items: ‘95 PC, Bliss Hoodie, Clippy Head and Mouse Pointer Wings. Check them out in the Dressing Room.

node.text:
Episode 352: I would rather talk to AI than go to another meeting!! Feat Microsoft Researcher Alexia Cambon

Introducing AI colleagues. Learn more through @microsoft’s new Work Trend Index.

🚋🚋🚋🚋

Hosted by @kareem
Created by @kareem & @akuoproject
Shot by @anthonydimieri & @thomaskasemlin
Edited by @mikezannetti
Associate producer @ramy_shafi

#microsoftpartner #WorkTrendIndex #podcast #subway #hottakes #subwaytakes #interview #nyc
📸 Microsoft 50th photo dump. #Microsoft50

node.text: I've got my favorite. #Microsoft50
Microsoft Bob and Comic Sans? The good old days. 😌 #Microsoft50

Games evolve. Memories are made. But the feeling never changes. For 50 years, game changers and trailblazers have shaped the way we play—pushing boundaries, creating incredible experiences, and making gaming better for all. And we’re just getting started. Here’s to the next 50 years of play! 🎮 #Microsoft50
Mid-week morning routine

node.text:
It’s always fun catching up with my friend and @microsoft's cofounder @thisisbillgates. I hope you enjoy our conversation about his new book, Microsoft’s 50th birthday, and why the best of the digital revolution is yet to come. #Microsoft50 

Link in bio for our full conversation.

node.text: Expert tip: be intentional about what you want to achieve. We're still celebrating at the link in bio. ❤️

Our 2025 NBA All-Star Sneaker Lab was a huge success! Thanks to our partner @microsoft, students from @oakland_school_of_arts learned how to use Microsoft Copilot’s advanced AI technology to unleash their creativity and design a pair of @nike Air Force 1 sneakers! Also under the guidance of instructors from @beyondtheballexperience and @solespacelab, students brought their AI designs to life using a variety of fabrics, paint, and sustainable materials. The custom sneakers and Microsoft Copilot designs were highlighted and on display for fans at NBA Crossover. Let us know in the comments which design you like the most!

node.text: A snow cone!? Nope, that’s a heart. 🫀
The moment I peaked.

Satya Nadella and Dwarkesh Patel chatted it up about two major breakthroughs in quantum computing and generative AI in gaming. 🍿 Swipe through for a few snippets and check out the full podcast at the link in bio.

slide 2 ➡️ Quantum

Slide 3 ➡️ Global growth

Slide 4 ➡️ Future of work

Slide 5 ➡️ Reflections on AGI

node.text:
#MicrosoftPartner Microsoft’s Majorana 1 chip is changing quantum computing with topological superconductors, creating scalable, stable qubits. This compact chip integrates topological qubits and control electronics, using precise microwaves for accurate quantum measurements. It promises innovations like self-healing materials and safer chemical discoveries, paving the way for a quantum-powered future.

Click the link in bio to learn more. 

#Microsoft #QuantumComputing #QuantumLeap #QuantumAI #AI #Sponsored

node.text: No plans this Valentine’s Day? Now you do. Don’t miss #CaptainAmericaBraveNewWorld in theaters TOMORROW #Windows11 #Copilot @marvelstudios @dannyramirez

Experience the timeless beauty of St. Peter’s Basilica like never before! 🏛️✨ Through a groundbreaking collaboration between Microsoft, the Vatican, and Iconem, a stunning 3D digital twin of this iconic landmark has been created using advanced AI and photogrammetry.

Learn more at the link in bio.

node.text:
AI is accelerating scientific breakthroughs at an unprecedented scale.​ 

From Project Aurora predicting extreme weather patterns to MatterGen designing new materials in hours instead of months, we’re seeing AI transform how we tackle humanity’s biggest challenges. 

@msft_research is where computational power meets scientific discovery, pushing the boundaries of what’s possible.​ AI can spot patterns in massive datasets and simulate countless possibilities that humans alone might never uncover. This isn’t just faster science - it’s entirely new ways of discovery. ​ 

What scientific breakthrough would you love to see AI tackle next? 🤔
The Surface RT, a 1.5-pound hybrid tablet, redefined versatility in computing. It marked an important step in Microsoft’s journey for future innovations like the Surface Copilot+ PCs. #Microsoft50
